news.content: I was selected for the Deep Learning Summer School 2026 at Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory.
Our paper has been accepted at IEEE DySPAN 2026.
Our paper has been accepted at IEEE ICC 2026, Glasgow, Scotland, UK.
I was selected for the 2026 cohort of iREDEFINE Fellows, which will be held in Albuquerque, New Mexico.
Our paper has been accepted at IEEE ICNC 2026, Maui, Hawaii.
Our paper has been accepted at IEEE CCNC 2026, Las Vegas, NV.
Our paper has been accepted as a poster at IEEE CCNC 2026, Las Vegas, NV.
I was selected to attend 2026 INTERSECT Bootcamp at Princeton University, July 13-17, 2026
